spatial: The 'Fine Dining TV' logo is centered on the screen. The reflection of the logo is directly below the main text. The yellow line is underneath the word 'Dining'.
state_changes: Scene transitions back to the 'Fine Dining TV' logo with a bright lens flare effect appearing.

visible_entities.desc: Logo text reading 'Fine Dining TV' in a white serif font, with 'Fine' stacked above 'Dining', a horizontal yellow line under 'Dining', and 'TV' stacked vertically to the right of 'Dining'.
A reflection of the logo text, appearing inverted and slightly faded.
A dark gray background with a subtle gradient and a light source effect in the bottom left corner.

atomic_facts.fact: The text 'Fine Dining TV' is displayed in the center of the screen.
A reflection of the logo is visible directly below the main text.
A yellow horizontal line underlines the word 'Dining'.

spatial: The 'Fine Dining TV' logo is centered on the screen. The reflection of the logo is located directly below the main text. The yellow line is positioned underneath the word 'Dining'.
